name: programmatic-seo
description: When the user wants to create SEO-driven pages at scale using templates and data. Also use when the user mentions "programmatic SEO," "template pages," "pages at scale," "directory pages," "location pages," "[keyword] + [city] pages," "comparison pages," "integration pages," "building many pages for SEO," "pSEO," "generate 100 pages," "data-driven pages," or "templated landing pages." author: coreyhaines31
summary_zh: 这是一款结合数据和模板批量生成SEO网页的工具，专门解决需要针对不同关键词或地区大规模建页做搜索排名的痛点。
